meaning: n.海峡,水道,沟,路线vt.引导,开导,形成河道 信道,频道
examples: I hope Channel 4 doesn't bleep it out.
Here the river is confined in a narrow channel.
Meantime a billboard and radio campaign urges customers to lobby cable operators to carry the channel.
The strong sterling means British buyers are crossing the channel in increasing numbers, Continental brokers say.
